UpdateAppBlbServerGroupPort.sgId: Identifier of the server group to which the port belongs
UpdateAppBlbServerGroupPort.portId: Identifier of the server group port to be updated
UpdateAppBlbServerGroupPort.enableHealthCheck: Whether to enable health check, default true
UpdateAppBlbServerGroupPort.healthCheck: Health check protocol, supports "HTTP"/"TCP"/"UDP"/"ICMP"; default is TCP for TCP listeners, UDP for UDP listeners, HTTP for HTTP listeners
UpdateAppBlbServerGroupPort.healthCheckPort: Health check port, defaults to the value of port; takes effect when health check protocol is "HTTP"
UpdateAppBlbServerGroupPort.healthCheckUrlPath: Health check URI path, default /; takes effect when health check protocol is "HTTP"
UpdateAppBlbServerGroupPort.healthCheckTimeoutInSecond: Health check timeout in seconds, default 3, must be an integer between 1 and 60
UpdateAppBlbServerGroupPort.healthCheckIntervalInSecond: Health check interval in seconds, default 3, must be an integer between 1 and 10
UpdateAppBlbServerGroupPort.healthCheckDownRetry: Unhealthy threshold: number of consecutive failed health checks before the backend server is blocked, default 3, must be an integer between 2 and 5
UpdateAppBlbServerGroupPort.healthCheckUpRetry: Healthy threshold: number of consecutive successful health checks before the backend server is restored to available, default 3, must be an integer between 2 and 5
UpdateAppBlbServerGroupPort.healthCheckNormalStatus: HTTP status codes considered healthy, supports combinations of 5 status code classes, e.g. "http_1xx|http_2xx", default "http_2xx|http_3xx"; takes effect when health check protocol is "HTTP"
UpdateAppBlbServerGroupPort.healthCheckHost: Host header field for layer-7 health check requests, e.g. "localhost", default ""; takes effect when health check protocol is "HTTP"
UpdateAppBlbServerGroupPort.udpHealthCheckString: Health check string for UDP service; required when health check protocol is "UDP"
